channel.title: Glass Box Gardens
channel.description: Fresh takes for planted-tank keepers and aquascapers.

item.title: Five mistakes everyone makes in their first month of hardscape
item.description: The most common early stumbles in hardscape, and the cheap corrections that fix them for planted-tank keepers and aquascapers.

item.title: "low tech planted tank" in practice: a real-world field test
item.description: We put the most-repeated advice about low tech planted tank through a month of actual use. Some of it survived.

item.title: Ask the forge: your livestock questions, answered
item.description: Straight answers to the livestock questions planted-tank keepers and aquascapers keep asking, minus the hedging.

item.title: The quiet upgrade: small tweaks in co2 with outsized returns
item.description: No purchases, no overhauls — the modest co2 adjustments that planted-tank keepers and aquascapers report mattering most.

item.title: Myth vs. reality: low tech planted tank
item.description: The persistent myths around low tech planted tank, stress-tested against what planted-tank keepers and aquascapers actually report.

item.title: A weekend project: level up your plants in two hours
item.description: One contained, satisfying plants project for planted-tank keepers — start Saturday morning, done by lunch.

item.title: Community pulse: what r/Aquascape is debating this week
item.description: The arguments, consensus shifts, and quietly useful threads from the livestock community this week.

item.title: The co2 checklist: run this before you spend
item.description: Seven questions that separate a justified co2 purchase from an expensive mood.

item.title: Five mistakes everyone makes in their first month of hardscape
item.description: The most common early stumbles in hardscape, and the cheap corrections that fix them for planted-tank keepers and aquascapers.

item.title: "aquascape hardscape ideas" in practice: a real-world field test
item.description: We put the most-repeated advice about aquascape hardscape ideas through a month of actual use. Some of it survived.

item.title: Ask the forge: your livestock questions, answered
item.description: Straight answers to the livestock questions planted-tank keepers and aquascapers keep asking, minus the hedging.

item.title: The quiet upgrade: small tweaks in co2 with outsized returns
item.description: No purchases, no overhauls — the modest co2 adjustments that planted-tank keepers and aquascapers report mattering most.

item.title: Myth vs. reality: aquascape hardscape ideas
item.description: The persistent myths around aquascape hardscape ideas, stress-tested against what planted-tank keepers and aquascapers actually report.

item.title: Choosing the Right Plants for Your Aquarium
item.description: Selecting the right plants for your aquarium

item.title: Choosing the Right Livestock for Your Aquarium
item.description: Selecting the right livestock for your aquarium

item.title: Maintaining Your CO2 System for Optimal Performance
item.description: Regular maintenance is key to optimal CO2 system performance

item.title: Understanding and Managing Aquarium Water Parameters
item.description: Understanding water parameters is crucial for aquarium health
